title: FunTime AH Helper
body:
💸 **FunTime AH Helper — a smart deal highlighter for the auction house**
Tired of manually comparing prices on the auction? This mod does it instantly for you.

**FunTime AH Helper** scans listings, finds the best deals, and highlights them in real time.

✨ **Features**

🧠 Detects auction items using lore/NBT triggers (buy, price, etc.)

🏆 Highlights the top 3 most profitable listings

🎨 Customizable colors for Top-1 / Top-2 / Top-3

📦 **1+ Mode** — compares price per item instead of the whole stack

📊 Left-side stats panel (min/average lot price, min/average price per item)

⚙️ Advanced enchantment filters:

* Required enchantments
* Enchantment blacklist
* Supported level ranges: 1, 4, 5, 5–10
* Custom enchantment support
* Support for custom enchantments without levels

🎯 **Use cases**

* Quickly find the best deals
* Avoid overpaying for stacks

🛠️ **Compatibility**

* Works on Fabric
* Minecraft version: 1.21.4
* ModMenu support (optional)

📌 **How to use**

1. Open the auction
2. Use the left toggle **“Consider 1+”** to switch comparison mode
3. Open mod settings with the hotkey (default: **O**, can be changed in controls)
4. Configure colors and enchantment filters in settings

📩 For questions and bug reports: Telegram / Discord — **@b1nt1n**
